title: Consolidate 107 carryoverTodos: prune stale failure echoes + dedup landed-work shadows, then batch real small items into 4-6-per-cycle sweep groups
summary: state.json carryoverTodos has 107 entries in three populations (operator audit 2026-07-13): (1) ~71 stale failure echoes (cycle-366..375-failed-* etc., cycles_unpicked>=20, expiresAt 2026-08-05) whose root causes are long fixed — including cycle-704/709-failed-ship items describing the SELF_SHA_IO cascade already healed 2026-07-12; these carry priority P0 yet are never picked (priority inversion) and pollute every triage read. (2) ~10-15 duplicate shadows of inbox items or already-landed work (fleet-config-hot-reload-wave-boundary LANDED 2026-07-13; loop-batch-chaining duplicates the 0.88 inbox item; todo-chronicle-s3-digest-wiring duplicates chronicle-s3). (3) ~15-25 genuinely small file-scoped actions (e.g. tdd-topn-binding-gate-extension gate.go:49, ship-stage-explicit-paths, tdd-topn-binding-gate-treeclaim). THIS CYCLE: judge each todo against landed dossiers + current inbox — DELETE population 1 and 2 (record ids+reason in the cycle dossier), CLUSTER population 3 by code area into 4-6-item sweep groups and file each group as ONE inbox item (weight ~0.75, kind=sweep, trivial-class-eligible where diffs are small) so sweep cycles consume them with multi-item top_n and amortize pipeline overhead. Do NOT hand-edit state.json outside the sanctioned state RMW path (flock). Related enabling mechanism: difficulty-conditioned-phase-budgets (inbox 2026-07-05) — lean phase spine for small items; consider raising its effective priority in triage.
acceptance: carryoverTodos count drops to only genuinely-live items (target <= ~25), with pruned ids + reasons recorded in the cycle dossier
each surviving small action appears in exactly one filed sweep-group inbox item (no orphans, no duplicates vs existing inbox)
state.json modified only via the sanctioned flocked RMW path; go test -race PASS on any touched packages
next-cycle triage prompt no longer carries the pruned P0 echoes
